code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test24-AUG-2023Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, significant proteinuria, bilirubinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria, and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal), suggesting possible renal dysfunction with impaired filtration and tubular damage. Low urine specific gravity further supports impaired concentrating ability. Hemoglobin A1c is low, which may reflect recent changes in glucose metabolism or anemia. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and further assessment for underlying renal and metabolic disorders.
